summary: ANDROID ⛔ CLOUD ☁️ Policy locked on phone but with wrong value
scenario: When a cloud policy locks a Sensors & Presence setting on a VFree20 device, the setting is locked on the mobile app but retains the phone's previous value instead of applying the policy-defined value.
description_clean: When a policy is set via Lens Cloud to lock a setting on a connected VFree20 device, the setting becomes locked on the mobile app but retains the phone's previously selected value instead of applying the value set in the cloud policy. Expected behavior: Sensors & Presence category settings should be lockable to a specific value defined in the cloud policy.
steps: 1. Set a policy via Lens Cloud to lock a setting on a connected VFree20 device.
2. Observe the setting on the mobile app.
3. Check the actual value applied on the device.
expected: Sensors & Presence category settings should be lockable to a specific value defined in the cloud policy.
actual: The setting becomes locked on the mobile app but retains the phone's previously selected value instead of applying the value set in the cloud policy.
